mapper.select: SELECT lt.tarea_id AS tarea_id, lt.nombre AS nombre, lt.horas_estimadas AS horas_estimadas, COALESCE(reg.horas_registradas, 0) AS horas_registradas FROM mss_lb_tarea lt LEFT JOIN ( SELECT a.tarea_id, ROUND(SUM(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (b.hora_fin - b.hora_inicio)) / 3600.0)::numeric, 2) AS horas_registradas FROM mss_bitacora b JOIN mss_asignacion a ON a.id = b.asignacion_id AND a.fecha_eliminacion IS NULL WHERE b.estado = 1 AND b.fecha_eliminacion IS NULL GROUP BY a.tarea_id ) reg ON reg.tarea_id = lt.tarea_id WHERE lt.linea_base_id = #{lineaBaseId} AND lt.fecha_eliminacion IS NULL ORDER BY lt.nombre
